availability.description: Release gate for a skill. Skills tagged `beta` or `experimental` are hidden from normal operators unless the user opts in via Settings → General → Preview Features.

values.description: Generally available. Default for new skills.
values.name: stable

values.description: Feature-complete but may have sharp edges. Opt-in.
values.name: beta

values.description: Early-stage, subject to breaking changes. Opt-in.
values.name: experimental

capability.description: A feature a model backend can advertise. Skills declare which capabilities they require; the resolver filters candidate backends to those that advertise all required capabilities.

values.description: Stepwise / chain-of-thought style generation, supports complex tool orchestration.
values.name: reasoning

values.description: Can call MCP tools during generation.
values.name: tools

values.description: Supports context windows beyond the provider's default (e.g. 1M tokens).
values.name: extendedContext

values.description: Streams tokens as they are generated.
values.name: streaming

values.description: Can emit multiple tool calls concurrently in a single turn.
values.name: parallelTools

values.description: Designed for sub-agent / coordinator patterns (Anthropic's Managed Agents, MCP sub-sessions).
values.name: multiAgent

deployment.description: Cloud/local preference for skill dispatch. Interacts with the user's privacy posture and provider routing rules.

values.description: Only dispatches to cloud providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.).
values.name: cloud_only

values.description: Prefer local backends (MLX, llama.cpp); fall back to cloud on capability miss.
values.name: local_preferred

values.description: Only dispatches to local backends. No cloud fallback.
values.name: local_only

values.description: No preference — resolver picks by other criteria (latency, cost, availability).
values.name: any
